articles.title: The tactics that could win Arsenal the Champions League
articles.summary: BBC Sport's tactics correspondent Umir Irfan looks at how Arsenal can defeat Paris St-Germain in Saturday's Champions League final.

articles.title: Budapest police investigating fan brawl before Champions League final
articles.summary: Police in Budapest have made arrests and are studying CCTV footage to identify supporters fighting before Saturday's Champions League final between Arsenal and Paris St-Germain.

articles.title: I feared people would leak my addiction - Shilton
articles.summary: England's most-capped footballer says being well-known made it harder to seek help about gambling.

articles.title: From 'bling-bling' & disputes to unity: The transformation of PSG
articles.summary: As Luis Enrique's PSG bid to defend their Champions League crown, European football expert Guillem Balague explores the club's transformation.

articles.title: From non-league to Champions League final - Raya's fairytale rise
articles.summary: Twelve years ago Arsenal keeper David Raya made his debut for non-league Southport; on Saturday he plays in the Champions League final - this is how he got there.

articles.title: Bristol City appoint Lincoln boss Skubala
articles.summary: Bristol City appoint Lincoln boss Michael Skubala as their new manager on a three-year deal.

articles.title: Arsenal's Timber fit to start Champions League final
articles.summary: Mikel Arteta says that  Dutch defender Jurrien Timber is fit to start the Champions League final after more than two months out with a groin injury.

articles.title: Konate set to leave Liverpool on a free transfer
articles.summary: France defender Ibrahima Konate is set to leave Liverpool for free when his contract expires in June.

articles.title: Champions League final still not free to air despite pressure
articles.summary: Fans will need a subscription to watch the Champions League final between Arsenal and PSG after TNT Sports decides against making the match free to air.

articles.title: What is Mourinho's managerial record?
articles.summary: Our Ask Me Anything team look at the managerial record of new Real Madrid manager Jose Mourinho.

articles.title: Real Madrid named football's most valuable club
articles.summary: Real Madrid are named as the most valuable club in world football, with Barcelona overtaking Manchester United to go second.

articles.title: 'An exciting young talent' - Meet NI's new recruit
articles.summary: Northern Ireland manager Michael McArdle says that teenager Emily Cassap is an "exciting young talent" as she is called into the senior squad for the first time.

articles.title: Torreense to play European football while in second division
articles.summary: Portuguese Cup winners Torreense will join an exclusive group of second division clubs to play in European competitions after suffering play-off final defeat.

articles.title: Football Daily
articles.summary: John Murray, Ian Dennis & Ali Bruce-Ball look ahead to the UEFA Champions League Final.

articles.title: Hussain questions England 'changing winning formula' in India loss
articles.summary: Nasser Hussain questioned England's selection after Charlotte Edwards' side suffered a disappointing 38-run defeat to India in the opening match of their T20 series on Thursday night.

articles.title: The Sunderland footballer setting record straight after 46 years
articles.summary: When Roly Gregoire quit football in 1980 after suffering a knee injury, he had faced so much racism that he could not bear to watch football for many years.
